50.reason: [In BFS, 'head' is an index into the queue 'team', but here it's used as a vertex. Should use 'team[head]' instead of 'head' to access the current vertex.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS, 'head' is an index into the queue 'team', but here it's used as a vertex. Should use 'team[head]' instead of 'head' to access the current vertex.]
